buildCommand: cd ../.. && if [ "$VERCEL_ENV" = "preview" ]; then CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY="$CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY_STAGING" VITE_CONVEX_URL="$VITE_CONVEX_URL_STAGING" bun x convex deploy --deployment staging --cmd "bun run build:prod" --cmd-url-env-var-name VITE_CONVEX_URL; else bun x convex deploy --cmd "bun run build:prod" --cmd-url-env-var-name VITE_CONVEX_URL; fi
